title: README.md architecture diagram does not capture Pest Control dual role
fix: MEMORY.md references deleted _session-3be37d without noting its absence is expected
description:
MEMORY.md:51 references "_session-3be37d" as the session where CLAUDE.md was synced after accidentally deleting a session directory. The session directory itself does not exist on disk (it was the one that was deleted).

The reference is correct as a historical narrative but could confuse someone grepping for session IDs and finding no matching directory.

Fix: Annotate the MEMORY.md reference: "(this session directory was accidentally deleted — absence is expected)."

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] MEMORY.md _session-3be37d reference annotated with expected-absence note

Audit reference: DRIFT-025 from docs/audits/2026-02-21-orchestration-drift-audit.md

title: README.md deprecated agent row inconsistently formatted
SETUP.md references wrong path for SESSION_PLAN_TEMPLATE.md
README.md deprecated agent row inconsistently formatted
fix: MEMORY.md custom agent minimum file requirements TBD caveat may be stale
description:
MEMORY.md:17 states: "Minimum file requirements still TBD — short files (9 lines) failed while full-body agents (200+ lines) work. Needs more testing to find the threshold."

All current agent files exceed 200 lines. CONTRIBUTING.md:33-35 documents the restart requirement but does not mention file size constraints. If the threshold was determined and file size is no longer an issue, the MEMORY.md caveat is misleading. If still unknown, CONTRIBUTING.md is missing a useful warning.

Fix: Determine current status. If file size is no longer a constraint, remove the TBD caveat from MEMORY.md. If still relevant, add a warning to CONTRIBUTING.md.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] MEMORY.md TBD caveat resolved (removed or updated with findings)

Audit reference: DRIFT-028 from docs/audits/2026-02-21-orchestration-drift-audit.md

fix: MEMORY.md Project Structure still lists colony-tsa.md as being eliminated
description:
MEMORY.md Project Structure section (line 28) lists:
`orchestration/templates/colony-tsa.md — Colony TSA (being eliminated, see HANDOFF)`

The colony-tsa.md file was archived months ago at orchestration/_archive/colony-tsa.md. The "Completed: Colony TSA Eliminated" section later in the same MEMORY.md correctly records the completion. The Project Structure section was never updated.

Fix: Update the Project Structure section to reflect the archived path and completed status.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] MEMORY.md Project Structure shows colony-tsa.md at its archived path with completed status

Audit reference: DRIFT-027 from docs/audits/2026-02-21-orchestration-drift-audit.md

title: SETUP.md Prerequisites section duplicates Quick Setup commands
description: Root cause: orchestration/SETUP.md lines 8-16 (Prerequisites) and lines 19-29 (Quick Setup) show nearly identical install commands. Maintainability concern: changes must be made in two places. Fix: Remove code block from Prerequisites, keep it only in Quick Setup. Found by: excellence-reviewer (P3).
